title: Visible Chest Names
description: Makes chest (and other block entity) names visible without opening the GUI.
body:
# Visible Chest Names

Visible Chest Names is a relatively simple mod that allows you to see the names of chests and other block entities (like shulkers, barrels, furnaces, etc.) above the chest or other block entity without opening a GUI. It uses text display entities to achieve this behavior which are created when you place down the chests. The mod does not automatically generate labels for previously placed chests yet, this is a planned feature for the future.
